entities.description: tcp ip is a protocol suite that mqtt is built upon  enabling communication over networks
ibm is the organization that released the mqtt protocol in 1999
1999 is the year when the mqtt protocol was released by ibm
mqtt is a lightweight  simple  open  and easy to implement protocol with low overhead and bandwidth usage  suitable for iot and small devices

relations.description: mqtt is built on top of the tcp ip protocol  allowing it to function over networks
mqtt was developed and released by ibm in 1999
mqtt was released in the year 1999
mqtt is described as a lightweight  simple  open  and easy to implement protocol with low overhead and bandwidth usage  suitable for iot and small devices
